We caught up with former LA Mayor Antonio Villaraigosa, who has always been gracious to reporters like me. Now running for governor of California, he emphasized that the #1 issue on voters’ minds is the rising cost of living. “We must listen to the people,” he told us. Do you think that’s the biggest challenge facing Californians today? Drop your comments below.

Antonio Villaraigosa wants to be California’s next governor. Here’s what he says he would do differently from the state’s current administration. We sat down for in-depth interviews with each candidate for California governor to push past the talking points. Tap the link in our bio to hear from all of the candidates, and follow to see more as we roll out in-depth interviews on our website and YouTube.

Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass announced her endorsement of California gubernatorial candidate Antonio Villaraigosa on Tuesday. "I am honored to have the endorsement of Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass," Villaraigosa said in a statement. "I greatly appreciate her support in this campaign and look forward to collaborating with Mayor Bass for the health, safety, and betterment of Angelenos and all Californians." Bass and Villaraigosa have been long supporters of each other's political careers. Villaraigosa backed Bass' 2022 mayoral campaign and was a member of her mayoral transition team.

Former Los Angeles Mayor Antonio Villaraigosa is making his pitch to voters in California's 2026 governor's race, launching his first prime-time television ad Thursday night with a focus on affordability and fiscal leadership. #politics #election #california #gavinnewsom #governor #ca #abc7news

San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan published an op-ed in the San Francisco Standard over the weekend, suggesting Governor Gavin Newsom refocus his energy on important issues rather than social media antics. "We'd be doing better if Sacramento was doing more. And I want to make very clear, that we cannot confuse internet rhetoric with real world results," Mahan said. #california #politics #gavinnewsom #mattmahan #abc7news

San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan is entering the race for California governor, joining an already crowded field less than five months before the primary. Mahan announced his candidacy on Thursday morning, arguing that his tenure in San Jose shows what he calls a results-driven approach to governing and now faces a tight timeline to raise money and build statewide name recognition. While many of his competitors have held state or federal office, Mahan is expected to lean on his Silicon Valley ties as he ramps up fundraising. For more information, click the link below. #governor #cagovernorr #mattmahan #sanjose #mayormattmahan #mayor #gavinnewsom #abc7news
